computeBalance(uint256[],uint256,uint256.details: Uses rated balances for consistency with swaps and invariant calculations.

params.balancesLiveScaled18: Current live balances, adjusted for rates.
params.invariantRatio: Ratio of the new invariant to the old.
params.tokenInIndex: Index of the token to compute the balance for.

returns.newBalance: The new balance of the selected token, scaled to 18 decimals.

computeInvariant(uint256[],uint8).details: Uses balancesLiveScaled18, which include IRateProvider rates, for consistency with swap calculations.

params.balancesLiveScaled18: Token balances after applying decimal scaling and rates.
params.rounding: Rounding direction for the invariant calculation.

returns.invariant: The calculated invariant, scaled to 18 decimals.

params.normalizedWeights_: Array of normalized weights (e.g., [0.8e18, 0.2e18] for 80/20 pool).

onSwap((uint8,uint256,uint256[],uint256,.details: Uses balancesScaled18, which include IRateProvider rates if configured, to adjust swap calculations.

params.params: Swap parameters, including balancesScaled18 adjusted by rates.

returns.amountCalculatedScaled18: Calculated amount for the swap in scaled 18-decimal format.

computeBalance(uint256[],uint256,uint256.notice: Computes the new balance of a token after an operation.

computeInvariant(uint256[],uint8).notice: Computes and returns the pool's invariant using weighted math.

getNormalizedWeights().notice: Returns the normalized weights of the pool tokens.

initialize(uint256[]).notice: Initialize the weighted pool with normalized weights.

onSwap((uint8,uint256,uint256[],uint256,.notice: Execute a swap in the pool using weighted math.
